description: You are an emergency management analyst at the Centro Operativo Comunale (COC) of Bologna evaluating network resilience following a multi-vehicle collision on the Acosta corridor. Using the Bologna Acosta scenario at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/, evaluate the impact of the incident and a dynamic rerouting strategy. Generate a baseline performance report including total completed trips, average travel time, average time loss, and total vehicle-hours of delay, saved to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_network_performance.csv. Simulate the incident by closing at least two edges on the main corridor using a rerouter definition at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/incident_rerouters.add.xml and a modified configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run_incident.sumocfg. Record the resulting performance metrics to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/incident_network_performance.csv. Document the incident location, rerouting strategy, performance comparison, percentage degradation, and response recommendations in an impact assessment report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/incident_assessment_report.txt.
